title: Build a daily previous-day MLB completed-game ingestion path into the canonical store
objective: Build the daily ingestion path that fetches the previous day’s completed MLB stats and appends them idempotently into the same canonical store created by the backfill task.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode rebuild work. No live model implementation or strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Change canonical storage target away from the approved spec
Expand into broader scheduling/platform work outside the updater path
required_work: 1. Implement a daily previous-day completed-game fetch path.
2. Append into the same canonical raw store defined by the spec.
3. Make the ingestion idempotent and safe for reruns.
4. Preserve compatibility with the season backfill output.
acceptance_criteria: Previous-day completed MLB stats can be appended safely
